# AGENTS.md

## Project

Go backend (Go 1.25, Echo v4) using OpenAPI-first code generation, PostgreSQL via sqlc, goose migrations. Template-based ‚Äî `go.mod` module is still `go-service-template`.

## Generated code ‚Äî do not edit

- `internal/transport/http/v1/api.gen.go` ‚Äî generated by oapi-codegen
- `internal/db/sqlc/storage/` ‚Äî generated by sqlc

Regenerate after changes:
```sh
oapi-codegen -config oapi-codegen.yml api/openapi.yaml   # after editing api/openapi.yaml
sqlc generate -f internal/db/sqlc/sqlc.yaml               # after editing queries/ or migrations/
```

## Adding a new endpoint

1. Define the route in `api/openapi.yaml`
2. Regenerate: `oapi-codegen -config oapi-codegen.yml api/openapi.yaml`
3. Implement the new method ‚Äî the `StrictServerInterface` enforces it at compile time
4. Wire handler in `internal/transport/http/server/server.go`

## Adding a new query

1. Write SQL with sqlc annotations in `internal/db/sqlc/queries/`
2. Regenerate: `sqlc generate -f internal/db/sqlc/sqlc.yaml`
3. Use generated methods in the repository layer (`internal/repository/`)

## Adding a new migration

```sh
goose -dir internal/db/migrations create -s {name} sql
```

Migrations run automatically on app startup via embedded goose in `internal/app/app.go`.

## Commands

| Task | Command |
|------|---------|
| Build | `go build -o ./tmp/main ./cmd` |
| Run | `go run ./cmd` |
| Dev (hot-reload) | `air` |
| Dev (Docker) | `docker compose -f compose-dev.yml up` |
| Test | `go test ./...` |
| Single test | `go test -run TestName ./internal/path/to/pkg/` |
| Lint | `golangci-lint run` |

## Architecture layers

`transport/http` ‚Üí `service` ‚Üí `repository` ‚Üí `db/sqlc/storage`

- **Domain models** live in `internal/models/`, separate from sqlc-generated DB models
- **Sentinel errors** in `internal/errorz/` ‚Äî handlers map them to HTTP status codes via `errors.Is()`
- **Transactions**: use `repository.NewTransactor(db).RunInTx(ctx, fn)` ‚Äî all repo calls inside the callback auto-use the tx via `repository.Queries(ctx, q)`
- **Auth context**: `middleware.UserIDContextKey` (uuid.UUID) and `middleware.UserRoleContextKey` set by OpenAPI security scheme middleware

## Environment

Required env vars (loaded from `.env` file, then OS env):
- `POSTGRES_URL` ‚Äî full connection string
- `JWT_SECRET` ‚Äî HS256 signing key

Copy `.env.example` ‚Üí `.env`. Change the placeholder `JWT_SECRET` value before running.

## Gotchas

- S3, Kafka, Valkey code exists but is commented out in `internal/app/app.go` and `compose.yml` ‚Äî uncomment both to enable
- Dockerfile produces a `scratch` image with no CA certs ‚Äî add them if calling external HTTPS services
- No tests exist yet ‚Äî zero `_test.go` files in the repo
- Nix flake (`.envrc` / `flake.nix`) provides all dev tools; without Nix, install `sqlc`, `goose`, `oapi-codegen`, `air`, `golangci-lint` manually
